articles.author: Amanda Greenwood
articles.title: America’s Cholesterol Guidelines Updated by ACC and AHA - Newsweek
articles.description: New ACC/AHA guidelines urge earlier cholesterol screening and treatment, focusing on lifetime heart risks.
articles.content: Americans may soon be advised to start paying closer attention to their cholesterol levels much earlier in life, under sweeping new guidelines released by the American College of Cardiology (ACC) and… [+4373 chars]
